name: Eekso — Through the Gates
dmNotes: STRONG START for S26 (Claude prep 2026-07-16 — reskin freely). Open mid-sprint. The roar does NOT force the gate tonight — dread, then silence. The bar being NEW is the first clue someone maintains this place. Go live BEFORE the recap so the river bed is already under your voice.

music.label: Inside — unwelcome
music.file: music/Russell Shaw - What Lies Behind- Open the Door.mp3

ideas.text: Someone notices the gate's bar is freshly cut — who barred it last?
If they climb the wall to look back: the far bridge is EMPTY. Nothing followed. Worse.
They'll want a rest — the gatehouse is defensible; the halls below are not.

entities.name: The second roar
entities.note: Never seen tonight. Identity parked in grill-queue.

entities.name: The gatehouse
entities.note: Dwarven iron, new bar. Defensible rest spot.
